tagline: We Make Digital Agriculture & IoT technologies

products.name: Elastic-Watch
products.description: An IoT platform allowing the monitoring and control of environment variables, fire detection, and vandalism acts using sensors, cameras and AI.

products.name: Elastic-Agri
products.description: A customized ERP for farmers containing modules for human resources, finance and stock management, accounting, animal husbandry, planting, and machines management.

products.name: Elastic-Analytica
products.description: Analytics and data visualization platform to store and process Big Data mainly coming from the IoT platform Elastic-Watch.

products.name: Elastic-Automata
products.description: AI platform that automates IoT devices based on information from Elastic-Analytica after ML processing.

products.name: Elastic-Reality
products.description: AR/VR platform allowing the expansion of industry and agriculture to another dimension, mainly in terms of remote management.

products.name: IoT platform
products.description: Allows monitoring and control of IoT devices

products.name: Customized ERP for farmers
products.description: ERP system with multiple modules tailored for farmers

products.name: Analytics platform
products.description: Stores and processes Big Data from IoT platform

products.name: AI platform
products.description: Automates IoT devices using machine learning processing

products.name: AR/VR platform
products.description: Enables remote management in agriculture and industry via AR/VR

website_content:
[ ![person graphic](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/logo-elastic-solutions.png) ](https://elastic-solutions.com/)
* [Home](https://elastic-solutions.com/#top)
* [About Us](https://elastic-solutions.com/#about)
* [Services](https://elastic-solutions.com/#services)
* [Next platforms](https://elastic-solutions.com/#portfolio)
* [Message Us](https://elastic-solutions.com/#contact)
* [Contact Now](https://elastic-solutions.com/#contact)
Menu
* [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/ElasticSolutionsTN/)
* [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/company/elasticsolutionstn)
###### Welcome to Elastic-Solutions
## We Make _Digital Agriculture_ & IoT technologies
A Rapid-application development (RAD) startup, providing Smart platforms serving mainly Agriculture 3.0, based on IoT technologies. .
![](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/agri.jpg)
![](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/agri2.jpg)
![](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/agri3.png)
![](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/agri4.jpg)
![person graphic](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/about-left-image.png)
![reporting](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/service-icon-01.png)
#### Solution oriented
We are providing solutions, it could be software, hardware, process as well as ideas!
![](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/service-icon-02.png)
#### Business oriented
Our solutions will be developed based on real business need, based on Design Thinking methodology
![](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/service-icon-03.png)
#### Innovation oriented
We provide Smart platforms based on the most innovative trends (Iot, Big Data, AI, VR, AR…)
##  [_Elastic_ -Watch](https://ew.tn) A PoC is ready and deployed for some early tester customers
[Demo PoC](https://demo.ew.tn)
This is our second platform, an IoT platform allowing the monitoring and control of:
- environment variables (such as temperature, moisture, soil salinity, water salinity...)
- fire detection via sensors, cameras and AI
- vandalism acts (theft, harmful animals, physical harm by human...) using cameras and advanced AI algorithms
##  _Elastic_ -Agri A PoC is ready and deployed as demo
[Demo PoC](https://elastic-agri.elastic-solutions.com/public/)
This is our first platform, a customized ERP for farmers, it contains multiple modules:
- Human resources
- Finance and stock management
- Accounting
- Animal Husbandry management
- Planting management
- Machines management ...
## Next platforms
#### Elastic-Analytica
will be our analytics and data visualization platform to store and process Big Data mainly coming from the IoT platform Elastic-Watch
![](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/portfolio-image.png)
#### Elastic-Automata
will be our AI platform, that will automate IoT devices based on information coming from Elastic-Analytica after ML processing
![](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/portfolio-image.png)
#### Elastic-Reality
will be our AR/VR platform allowing the expansion of Industry and Agriculture to another dimension, mainly in terms of remote management
![](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/portfolio-image.png)
## Feel Free To Send Us
#### For any enquiry, Call Us:  [+216 36 365 558](https://elastic-solutions.com/)
Send Message
![](https://elastic-solutions.com/assets/images/contact-decoration.png)

tavily.answer: Elastic Solutions is a software development company founded in 2013, headquartered in Houston, Texas, focusing on B2B marketing and lead generation. Wellfound is a startup based in New York City, focusing on startup discovery. Elastic, another company, is known for its data analytics platform.
